data.title: STLLR Gold Enhances Financial Leadership with Key Appointment
data.description:
The latest update is out from Moneta Gold ( (TSE:STLR) ).

STLLR Gold Inc. has appointed Conor Kearns as Vice President of Finance, highlighting his extensive experience in corporate finance and strategic planning. This leadership change is expected to enhance the company’s financial strategy as it progresses its key projects in Canada, potentially impacting its operational efficiency and market positioning.

More about Moneta Gold

STLLR Gold Inc. is a Canadian gold development company focused on advancing two major gold projects in Canada: the Tower Gold Project in the Timmins Mining Camp, Ontario, and the Colomac Gold Project north of Yellowknife, Northwest Territories. These projects have significant potential for long-term, large-scale operations, and are surrounded by exploration land with promising prospects. STLLR’s management team has a proven track record in advancing projects and operating mines.

YTD Price Performance: 20.69%

Average Trading Volume: 114,825

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: C$132.6M

data.title: Cheniere Energy Appoints Matthew Runkle to Board
data.description:
The latest update is out from Cheniere Energy ( (LNG) ).

On April 1, 2025, Matthew Runkle was appointed to the Board of Directors of Cheniere Energy, Inc., following a right granted to CQP Holdco LP in an agreement from 2012. Concurrently, Scott Peak resigned from the Board. This change in the board composition could influence the company’s strategic direction and stakeholder interests.

More about Cheniere Energy

Cheniere Energy, Inc. operates in the energy sector, primarily focusing on liquefied natural gas (LNG) production and export. The company is a key player in the global LNG market, providing energy solutions to international markets.

YTD Price Performance: 7.73%

data.title: Intra-Cellular Therapies Completes Merger with Johnson & Johnson
data.description:
Intra-Cellular Therapies ( (ITCI) ) has provided an announcement.

On April 2, 2025, Intra-Cellular Therapies notified the Nasdaq Stock Market of its merger completion and plans to delist its shares from the Nasdaq Global Select Market. This move is part of a broader change in control as the company becomes a wholly-owned subsidiary of Johnson & Johnson, with the merger valued at approximately $14.6 billion. Following the merger, all previous directors resigned, and the company’s certificate of incorporation and bylaws were amended to align with those of the acquiring entity.

More about Intra-Cellular Therapies

data.title: Asep Medical Holdings Inc. Announces Strategic Debt Settlement
data.description:
An update from ASEP Medical Holdings Inc ( (TSE:ASEP) ) is now available.

Asep Medical Holdings Inc. announced a debt settlement of $1,343,699 by issuing 26,873,980 common shares at $0.05 per share to certain creditors, including directors and officers. This transaction, classified as a related party transaction, is exempt from certain regulatory requirements and aims to immediately improve the company’s financial position. The settlement reflects Asep’s strategic move to strengthen its financial standing, potentially enhancing its market position and operational capabilities.

More about ASEP Medical Holdings Inc

Asep Medical Holdings Inc. is focused on addressing the global challenge of antibiotic failure by developing innovative solutions for unmet medical needs in human medicine. The company consolidates three private entities: Sepset Biosciences Inc., ABT Innovations Inc., and SafeCoat Medical Inc., each with advanced technologies aimed at improving diagnostics and treatments for sepsis and biofilm infections.

Average Trading Volume: 32,998

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

data.title: Azul S.A. Schedules Virtual Shareholders Meeting for April 2025
data.description:
Azul SA ( (AZUL) ) has issued an update.

The meeting will be conducted virtually, and the management’s proposal for the meeting is available for review. data.title: Cellularline S.p.A. Updates Financial Documentation for 2024
data.description:
Cellularline SpA ( (IT:CELL) ) has issued an announcement.

Cellularline S.p.A. has announced the availability of corrected financial documentation for the year ending December 2024, following a clerical error in previously published reports. This update ensures stakeholders have access to accurate financial information, potentially impacting investor confidence and regulatory compliance.

More about Cellularline SpA

Cellularline S.p.A., established in Reggio Emilia in 1990, is a leader in the smartphone and tablet accessories sector. The company, along with its various brands, focuses on delivering technologically advanced and creatively designed multimedia device accessories. Cellularline products are available in over 60 countries, supported by a workforce of 300 employees.

data.title: Ares Strategic Mining Secures Increased Institutional Investment
data.description:
An update from Ares Strategic Mining ( (TSE:ARS) ) is now available.

Ares Strategic Mining has announced a significant increase in institutional investment from UK-based Sorbie Bornholm LP, signaling strong support for Ares’ strategic transformation and growth plans. This financial boost is expected to accelerate site development and manufacturing capabilities, positioning Ares as a key player in the global fluorspar market, especially as it transitions from construction to production at its Utah operations.

More about Ares Strategic Mining

Ares Strategic Mining Inc. operates in the mining industry, focusing on transforming into a fully integrated North American fluorspar manufacturer. The company is engaged in the development and production of fluorspar, a critical mineral with significant industrial applications, particularly in the United States where it is entirely imported.

data.title: Nokia Advances Share Buyback Program with Recent Share Repurchase
data.description:
An update from Nokia ( (GB:0HAF) ) is now available.

Nokia Corporation has repurchased over 3 million of its own shares as part of a share buyback program aimed at offsetting the dilutive effects of new shares issued to Infinera Corporation shareholders. This program, which began in November 2024 and is set to conclude by the end of 2025, targets the repurchase of 150 million shares with a maximum expenditure of EUR 900 million. The recent transaction cost Nokia approximately EUR 14.8 million, and the company now holds over 220 million treasury shares. This strategic move is expected to strengthen Nokia’s market position and provide value to its stakeholders.

More about Nokia

Nokia is a B2B technology innovation leader that focuses on pioneering networks across mobile, fixed, and cloud domains. The company is known for its high-performance networks and intellectual property, supported by Nokia Bell Labs. Nokia provides secure and sustainable network solutions for service providers, enterprises, and partners globally, facilitating the creation of future digital services and applications.

YTD Price Performance: 18.18%

Average Trading Volume: 2,607,525

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: €26.01B

data.title: Hydreight Technologies Named Among Fastest Growing Companies in the Americas
data.description:
Hydreight Technologies Inc ( (TSE:NURS) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Hydreight Technologies Inc. has been recognized as one of the fastest-growing companies in the Americas by the Financial Times, highlighting its significant revenue growth from $400K to nearly $24M between 2020 and 2023. This accolade underscores the company’s robust performance and its strategic positioning in the direct-to-consumer telehealth market. Hydreight plans to expand its offerings and national footprint in 2025, further enhancing its value proposition for investors and stakeholders. The recognition reflects the increasing demand for accessible and scalable healthcare solutions, reinforcing Hydreight’s commitment to patient-centered services across the U.S.

More about Hydreight Technologies Inc

Hydreight Technologies Inc. is a digital health platform that operates one of the largest mobile clinic networks in the United States. It provides a proprietary platform that integrates tools for accounting, documentation, sales, inventory, booking, and patient data management, enabling healthcare professionals to deliver services directly to patients. The company is involved in high-growth sectors such as GLP-1 weight-loss medications, anti-aging therapies, IV wellness, at-home testing, and chronic care management. Hydreight is affiliated with a U.S. certified e-script and telemedicine provider network.

YTD Price Performance: -47.73%

Average Trading Volume: 98,962

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: C$27.57M

data.title: HST Global Delays Yearly Report Filing
data.description:
HST Global ( (HSTC) ) has released a notification of late filing.

HST Global, Inc. has announced a delay in filing its Form 10-K (Yearly Report) for the financial period ending December 31, 2024. The delay is primarily due to challenges in completing its financial statements for the fiscal year. The company anticipates that the report will be filed within 15 calendar days following the original due date. Importantly, HST Global does not expect any significant changes in its financial results compared to the previous fiscal year. The notification was signed by Mike Field, the Chief Executive Officer, indicating the company’s ongoing efforts to comply with regulatory requirements.

More about HST Global
